channel.title: Maine Bureau of Motor Vehicles Notices
channel.description: No dedicated BMV news archive exists; BMV announcements appear within the general SOS news feed. Monitoring the BMV portal landing page directly by full-page fingerprint as the most BMV-specific available source.

item.title: Monitoring started: Maine Bureau of Motor Vehicles Notices
item.description: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
